functions.name: LightDiffViewer
params:
{
	contents,
	viewMode,
	hideUnchangedRegions,
	filePath,
	className,
	style,
}

callGraph.callee:
Array.from(linesByIndex.values())
		.map<MeasuredRegion>((line) => ({
			type:
				line.hasAddition && line.hasDeletion
					? "modification"
					: line.hasAddition
						? "addition"
						: "deletion",
			top: line.top,
			bottom: line.bottom,
		}))
		.sort

trpcClient.external.openFileInEditor
				.mutate({
					path: link.resolvedPath,
					line: link.row,
					column: link.col,
				})
				.catch

trpcClient.external.openFileInEditor
					.mutate({ path: resolvedPath, line, column, projectId })
					.catch
